title: Claude Code CLI Lab
summary: Practice safe setup, first-run checks, and a tiny builder task in a resettable environment.
expectedOutput: A verified local builder session with one reviewed file change.

title: Prompt Refinement Lab
summary: Rewrite weak prompts, compare outputs, and save the strongest variant.
expectedOutput: A before-and-after prompt set with explanation notes.

title: Runtime Validation Lab
summary: Bring up a runtime, run a health check, and verify a first response safely.
expectedOutput: A health-check log and a documented first successful response.
